title: Kona Kondakari Lyrics Madha Yaanai Koottam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Kona Kondakari
Singer(s): G.V.Prakash Kumar
Music: N.R.Raghunanthan
Lyricist: Ekadasi
Movie: Madha Yaanai Koottam (2013)

Kona Kondakari kuthura kannaala
konnuthaan poraaley.
Naan paayil padukala
noyil kedakuren kaaranam yaarunga
keralathu saaralu thaanunga.

Dhinam dhinam thrikkakula kepayaatam
enna thirikkuraa.
Haiyyo kadugu thundhu idaya vachi
keranga adikkuraa.

Kumari pulla nesam
kozhi kuzhambu vaasam.
Ullukulla olinjikittu
usura arukkura. ......   (Kona Kondakari.)

Selagaa paakkura
idhayam pola thiriyudhey.
Aduppu theeya pol
usurum eriyudhey.

Kaalula nadakuren, manasula parakkuren.
ava mugam paathutaa, arai adi valaruren.

Sedhaaram illaama senjadhaaru avala
ava panjaaram pottuthaan
kavukuraaley aala.
Naan aattu pulukka pola
sudum veyilu kulla kedaken.
ava kooti perukkum podhu
naan kooda kulla poren...... (Kona Kondakari.)

Udhattu siripula, usuru karaiyudhey
avala nenachuthan vayiru nerayudhey.
sola thattathaan somaya thaangumaa
Naala saaikudhey allipoo renduthaan.

Poraala saavilla, maaraalathaan saavu
nooraala thaakudhey usilambatti sevu.
Aruvaa thookkathaaney
inga aalu koranju kidakku.
ava pathu pilla ennapola
peththu kodukkanum......... (Kona Kondakari.)

Dhinam dhinam thrikkakula kepayaatam
enna thirikkuraa.
Haiyyo kadugu thundhu idaya vachi
keranga adikkuraa.

Kumari pulla nesam
kozhi kuzhambu vaasam.
Ullukulla olinjikittu
usura arukkuraaa. ......   (Kona Kondakari.)

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the release year of the song Kona Kondakari?

The song was released in 2013.

Who is the singer of Kona Kondakari?

The song is sung by GV Prakash Kumar.

What is the theme of the song Kona Kondakari?

The song has an energetic and peppy theme, capturing the essence of Tamil folk music.

Who composed the music for Madha Yaanai Koottam?

enrichedMetadata.summary: Kona Kondakari is a lively and energetic song from the movie Madha Yaanai Koottam, capturing the vibrant spirit of Tamil folk traditions. Sung by GV Prakash Kumar, the song's catchy beats and dynamic rhythm make it perfect for celebrations and festive occasions. The lyrics by Ekadasi add a playful and engaging narrative, enhancing the song's appeal. This track is a testament to the cultural richness and musical diversity of Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kona Kondakari from the movie Madha Yaanai Koottam is a vibrant and energetic track that captures the essence of Tamil folk music. Sung by the talented GV Prakash Kumar, this song is a perfect blend of N. R. Raghunanthan's dynamic composition and Ekadasi's catchy lyrics. Dive into the lively beats and experience the cultural richness that makes this song a standout hit.
stanzaMeanings: The girl with sharp eyes is fighting fiercely. I am lying down, suffering, wondering who is the cause of this.
Every day, there is a game of tricks. Oh, the mustard seed is being crushed in the heart.
The love of a young girl smells like chicken curry. Hiding inside, it cuts the life away.
The heart is spinning like a spinning top. It burns like a stove fire.
I walk on the ground, but my mind flies. Seeing her face, I grow half an inch taller.
Without a husband, she is like a bird in a cage. I am like a sheep under the hot sun. When she gathers, I also go inside.
Her smile melts my life, thinking of her fills my stomach. Can a lazy person handle the burden? Two jasmine flowers are enough.
She won't die in a fight, only if she changes. The sound of Usilampatti echoes. The sickle is hanging here, people are few. She should give birth to ten children like me.
Every day, there is a game of tricks. Oh, the mustard seed is being crushed in the heart.
The love of a young girl smells like chicken curry. Hiding inside, it cuts the life away.
